header.title: Age Calculator — Calculate Your Exact Age Online Free
header.description: Free online age calculator to find your exact age in years, months, days, hours, minutes, and seconds. Discover birthday facts, zodiac signs, and fun historical events from your birth date.
header.keywords: age calculator, calculate age, how old am i, birthday calculator, age in years, exact age calculator, age from birthdate, find my age

howToUse.title: How to Use Age Calculator
howToUse.step1Desc: Select your date of birth using the date picker or type it in manually.
howToUse.step2Desc: Pick a target date or leave it as today to calculate your current age.
howToUse.step3Desc: See your age in years, months, days, hours, minutes, and seconds.
howToUse.step4Desc: Check your zodiac sign, Chinese zodiac, generation, and birthday milestones.

items.question: How is my exact age calculated?
items.answer: Your exact age is calculated by subtracting your birth date from the target date. The result shows the precise difference in years, months, days, hours, minutes, and seconds, accounting for leap years and varying month lengths.

items.question: Can I calculate my age for a future date?
items.answer: Yes, you can enter any future date in the "Calculate Age On" field to see how old you will be on that date. This is useful for planning birthdays, anniversaries, or retirement.

items.question: What does the live seconds counter do?
items.answer: The seconds counter updates in real time to show exactly how old you are down to the second. Watch your age increase as you stay on the page.

items.question: How is my zodiac sign determined?
items.answer: Your zodiac sign is determined by your birth month and day. The tool uses traditional Western astrology date ranges to match your birth date to the correct sign.

items.question: What generation am I part of?
items.answer: The tool determines your generation based on your birth year using widely accepted range definitions, such as Gen Z (1997-2012), Millennials (1981-1996), Gen X (1965-1980), and others.

items.question: Can I use this calculator for other people?
items.answer: Absolutely. Enter any person's date of birth to calculate their exact age, birthday facts, and milestones. It works for children, parents, grandparents, or historical figures.
